zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Ulam於大約1493年出生在英國越可爾多卡斯特時，她的父親Sir Daniel Uhlin19歲，母親Lady Katherina Wolf20歲。她於大約1510年與Sir Thomas Goodale在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年11月在她的家鄉享年95歲，埋葬在英國越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Ulam于大约1493年出生在英国越可爾多卡斯特时，她的父亲Sir Daniel Uhlin19岁，母亲Lady Katherina Wolf20岁。她于大约1510年与Sir Thomas Goodale在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年11月在她的家乡享年95岁，埋葬在英国越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ulam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Elam Grange in Bingley (Yorkshire). It is possible that some instances of the modern surname are from Elham in Kent or a lost place called Elham in Crayford (Kent), but the strong association with Yorkshire militates against this. Elam Grange probably means ‘river pool’, from Old English ēa ‘river’ + lum(m) ‘pool’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Ulam was born about 1493, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Daniel Uhlin, was 19 and her mother, Lady Katherina Wolf, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Goodale about 1510, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in November 1587, in her hometown, at the age of 95, and was buried in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Ulam est née environ 1493, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Daniel Uhlin, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherina Wolf, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Goodale environ 1510, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en novembre 1587, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Warmsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Ulam um 1493 in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Daniel Uhlin 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherina Wolf 20. Sie hat um 1510 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England Sir Thomas Goodale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im November 1587 im Alter von 95 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Ulam è nata il circa 1493 nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Daniel Uhlin, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherina Wolf, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Goodale circa 1510, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel novembre 1587, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Ulamが約1493年にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Daniel Uhlinは19歳，母Lady Katherina Wolfは20歳であった。約1510年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでSir Thomas Goodaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1587年11月に故郷で95歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワームスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Ulam(이)가 대략 1493년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Daniel Uhlin(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherina Wolf(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Sir Thomas Goodale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 11월 그녀의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 워스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Ulam nasceu aproximadamente 1493, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Daniel Uhlin, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherina Wolf, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Goodale aproximadamente 1510, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1587, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Ulam родилась около 1493 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Daniel Uhlin было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherina Wolf, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Goodale около 1510 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла ноябрь 1587 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности вармсворт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Ulam nació aproximadamente 1493, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Daniel Uhlin, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Katherina Wolf, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Goodale aproximadamente 1510, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en noviembre de 1587, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
